note: CALIBRATION CASE. Vague one-liner from an unknown sender with no clear signal type. Genuinely ambiguous — the spec requires confidence < 0.7 and needs_human, so confidence MUST stay below the 0.85 autonomy threshold. eventTypeOneOf is permissive on type; the real gate is maxConfidence.
